name: REVERSI xVSx
short_description: REVERSI xVSx is a Reversi game with modern features, including custom 3D graphics, user-created AI, online multiplayer, and streamer-viewer match functionality.
detailed_description:
About This Game

REVERSI xVSx is a Reversi game with modern features, including custom 3D graphics, user-created AI, online multiplayer, and streamer-viewer match functionality.

✅ Try Almost Everything in the Demo!

  • Full-featured online battles between demo versions

  • All custom assets (stones, board, background, BGM, CPU) can be used in the full version

🎨 Fully Customizable!

  • Create or download your own stones, boards, backgrounds, music, and CPU opponents

  • In-game guide explains how to make your own assets

  • Load from local files with ease

🤖 Build Your Own CPU Opponents!

  • You can play against a custom CPU with an AI you've created.

  • You can also set rewards for playing against it.

🎲 Variety of Game Modes

  • Classic Reversi rules

  • Single-color mode

  • Unique rules like "lose on misclick"

🌐 Online Multiplayer & Viewer Interaction

  • "Majority Vote Reversi" for up to 10 players

  • Streamer mode: viewers vote in chat to decide moves

📺 Streaming & Video Use
You are free to livestream or upload gameplay videos of this game and its demo—
whether you're an individual or a company, for free or for profit.
No permission or report is required (we probably can't respond anyway).
We will not charge or contact you afterward.
(However, please refrain from using the game in ways that violate public decency.)
